title: Tempeh Tagine with Egyptian Spices
description: A flavorful and aromatic North African-inspired dish featuring tempeh in a rich tagine sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add chopped onions and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add ground Egyptian spices and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add tempeh and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add chicken broth, molten chocolate, and chopped dates.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over couscous or rice.
